results.title: UN 38.3 test series | Lithium Battery Service
results.description: All lithium cells and batteries that are tested this year will be tested according to this 8 revised edtion of the manual of tests and criteria, When you are interested in the technical details of this UN test series 38.3, you can download the up-to-date version >of the English version here: https://unece.org/transport/dangerous-goods/rev7-files
results.content:
All lithium cells and batteries that are tested this year will be tested according to this 8 revised edtion of the manual of tests and criteria, When you are interested in the technical details of this UN test series 38.3, you can download the up-to-date version >of the English version here: https://unece.org/transport/dangerous-goods/rev7-files
In most of the checklists you can find a checkpoint regarding the so called UN 38.3 Test. Before lithium cells/batteries can be transported in the first place, they must have successfully passed certain tests. These tests simulate transport conditions like pressure, temperature, crush, impact ect. These tests are described in the United Nations manual called "UN manual of tests and criteria".
Part III of this manual describes in subsection 38.3 the 8 test modules which in some documents or data sheets are also called T.1 to T.8 test. Since 27th November 2023 the 8th revised edtion of the UN manual of tests and criteria is valid.
All lithium cells and batteries that are tested this year will be tested according to this 8 revised edtion of the manual of tests and criteria, When you are interested in the technical details of this UN test series 38.3, you can download the up-to-date version >of the English version here: https://unece.org/transport/dangerous-goods/rev7-files
January 2019 two tables have been added which present a nice overview on the number of test samples for each of the tests in the UN test series 38.3: With the changes on 1st Januar 2019 in the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria a new subsection 38.3.5 was added and all transport regulations refer to that.
